title: Copy Files Pro: Seamlessly Copy/Sync files between columns or items across boards

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Supercharge your monday.com workflows with seamless file copying!

Say goodbye to manual downloads and uploads—this app automates the process, saving you time and effort.

See it in action! Schedule a demo.

Key Features of Copy Files Pro for monday.com

Intelligent File Transfer: Copy or Sync:

  • Copy within the same board: Quickly duplicate files across columns or items.
  • Copy across different boards: Seamlessly move files between boards.
  • Sync Files Intelligently: Ensure destination columns always have the latest additions without creating duplicates. The “Sync” feature only copies new files, saving storage and processing time.

Time-Saving Automation:

  • Eliminate Manual Work: No more downloading and re-uploading.
  • Boost Productivity: Focus on what matters most instead of getting bogged down in file management.

Flexible Configuration:

  • Powerful, Yet Simple Recipes: Automate file transfers with intuitive integration recipes that require minimal setup.
  • Highly Customizable Actions: Use custom actions with any monday.com trigger for precise file-copying workflows.

Take your monday.com productivity to the next level with this seamless file copying solution!

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
New Feature Alert!

Introducing File Rename in Copy Files Pro

Rename files as you copy or sync them across monday.com boards with the latest Copy Files Pro update!

This highly requested functionality on monday.com community feature requests allows you to:

Rename files on the fly

Give your copied or synced files meaningful names as you transfer them.

Maintain organization

Ensure clarity and consistency in your file naming conventions across all your boards.

Streamline workflows

Eliminate the extra step of manually renaming files after copying or syncing.

Here’s how it works: When creating automations to copy or sync files to other boards, you can now select a file column or input custom text to be automatically used as the new file name, eliminating the need for manual renaming.

We hope this new addition will be a valuable asset to your workflows.

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
New Features Alert!

Introducing Move files & Copy/Sync files from Item Updates in Copy Files Pro

We’re excited to announce two powerful new features in Copy Files Pro designed to give you even more flexibility and control over your file management within monday.com!

You can now:

  1. Move Files: Easily move files between file columns and items across boards, ensuring your documents are always in the right place without manual re-uploading.

  2. Copy/Sync Files from Updates to Files Columns: Seamlessly copy files attached in item updates directly into a dedicated Files column. This is perfect for centralizing documents shared in conversations.

We hope this new addition will be a valuable asset to your workflows.
